record.field:
website = env.ref('hotel.website_industry')
to_deactivate = [ # Presets 'website.header_call_to_action', 'website.header_search_box', 'website.header_text_element', 'website.footer_custom', 'website_sale.carousel_product_indicators_left', 'website_sale.cta_wrapper_large', 'website_sale.filmstrip_categories_bordered', 'website_sale.product_buy_now_large', 'website_sale.product_quantity_large', 'website_sale.products_attributes_collapsible', 'website_sale.products_categories_list_collapsible', 'website_sale_renting.shop_rental_datepicker_opt', # Default static pages 'website.homepage', 'website.contactus', ]
to_activate = [ # Presets 'website_sale.carousel_product_indicators_bottom', 'website_sale.cta_wrapper_boxed', 'website_sale.floating_bar', ]
ctx = {'website_id': website.id}
for xml_id in to_deactivate: env.ref(xml_id).with_context(**ctx).write({'active': False}) for xml_id in to_activate: env.ref(xml_id).with_context(**ctx).write({'active': True})
menus = env['website.menu'] base_domain = [('website_id', '=', website.id)]
# Default menu items to remove menus.search(base_domain + [('url', 'in', ['/appointment'])]).unlink() # Rename /shop menu to "Rooms" menus.search(base_domain + [('url', '=', '/shop')], limit=1).write({'name': 'Rooms'}) # Add Contact Us menu item top_menu = menus.search(base_domain + [('parent_id', '=', False)], limit=1) if not menus.search(base_domain + [('url', '=', '/contactus')]): menus.create({ 'name': 'Contact Us', 'url': '/contactus', 'website_id': website.id, 'parent_id': top_menu.id if top_menu else False, })
